label: Garden Layout
items: All map overlays — frost, wind, soil pH, moisture and companion lines — now work in the 3D garden view, not just 2D
Overlay buttons are now available in the 2D editor too (they were previously unreachable outside 3D)
New Live sun mode: flick the Day/Live switch and scrub the time slider to see exactly which beds are lit or shaded at any time of day, in both 2D and 3D
The sun overlay now tints beds in the 2D view as well as 3D

label: Accessibility
items: The Help & Guides drawer is now properly hidden from screen readers while closed
